title: Coruscant Journal
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Coruscant Journal''''' was a popular periodical. It was the subscription of choice for a group of [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] swindlers, who marketed the ''Journal'' by using [[Salespeak 7]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-08-07 -->[[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']]
